parameters.content:
## SEO — Weekly Report
Runs every Sunday at 10:00 AM Israel time (08:00 UTC)

Aggregates 7-day data:
- Top pages by click growth
- Near-page-one queries
- Top content opportunities

Sends HTML report via WhatsApp webhook.

**Configure:** Set WHATSAPP_REPORT_PHONE in the Send Report node.

parameters.query:
SELECT
  page_url,
  SUM(clicks) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7) AS clicks_this_week,
  SUM(clicks) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14 AND date < CURRENT_DATE - 7) AS clicks_prev_week,
  SUM(impressions) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7) AS impressions_this_week
FROM seo_pages_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 14
GROUP BY page_url
HAVING SUM(clicks) FILTER (WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7) > 0
ORDER BY clicks_this_week DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  query,
  page_url,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_position)::numeric, 1) AS avg_position,
  SUM(impressions) AS total_impressions
FROM seo_queries_daily
WHERE date >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
GROUP BY query, page_url
HAVING AVG(avg_position) BETWEEN 5 AND 20
   AND SUM(impressions) >= 3
ORDER BY avg_position ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT opportunity_type, page_url, query, priority_score, impressions, avg_position
FROM seo_opportunities
WHERE detected_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
ORDER BY priority_score DESC
LIMIT 10;

=UPDATE seo_runs
SET status = 'success',
    finished_at = NOW(),
    notes = '{{ $('Build HTML Report').first().json.report_text.replace(/'/g, "''").substring(0, 2000) }}'
WHERE id = {{ $('Set Run ID').first().json.run_id }};
